title: Compostables
description: Compostables is a server-side mod that allows you to compost dozens of additional items
body:
## Compostables

Compostables is a server-side mod that allows you to compost 20 additional items.

### Version support

1.X.X = supports 1.17-1.20.4
2.X.X = supports 1.21+ (active development)


### Composting chance (per item)

10%: Bamboo

30%: Rotten Flesh, Chorus Fruit, Chorus Flower, Chorus Plant, Spider Eye, Poisonous Potato

50%: Slime Ball, Turtle Scute, Armadillo Scute*, Ink Sac, Glow Ink Sac, Fermented Spider Eye

65%: Rabbit Foot, Egg, Turtle Egg

85%: Popped Chorus Fruit, Honeycomb

100%: Glistering Melon Slice, Golden Carrot

* Only on versions 2.X.X+
